title: Soulful Ghazal Open Mic
description: An intimate evening celebrating the art of ghazal. Performers get 10-minute slots to showcase classical and contemporary ghazals. All skill levels welcome — come share your verse.
instructions: 10-minute performance slots. Bring your own instrument or use the house harmonium. Sign up at the door or online.

title: Tuesday Hip-Hop Open Mic
description: Weekly open mic for MCs, poets, and beat-boxers. 16-bar signups — bring your best bars. In-house DJ provides beats. Open to freestylers and pre-written performers.
instructions: 16-bar signups only. No playback — all performances over live DJ beats. Sign up starts 30 min before showtime.

title: Singer-Songwriter Night
description: An evening dedicated to original songs. Acoustic, folk, indie — all singer-songwriter genres welcome. Perform one original song (up to 5 minutes) in front of a supportive community.
instructions: Original songs only — no covers. Max 5 minutes per slot. House PA and mic provided.

title: Underground Cypher
description: Pune's monthly freestyle cypher is back! Form a circle, grab the mic, and spit your best bars. Judged rounds + open freestyle. Cash prize for the top MC.
instructions: Free entry for performers. Judged battle rounds start at 10 PM. Open freestyle from 9 PM.

title: Community Jam Session
description: A cross-genre jam session — bring any instrument, any style. Meet fellow musicians, jam together, and maybe start your next collaboration. Chai and snacks included!
instructions: Bring your own instrument. All genres and skill levels welcome. Collaborative jamming encouraged!
